raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint concerns a dispute currently under review by my credit card issuer ( Citibank ). 

Product/Service : Credit Card XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Issue Type : Billing Dispute Misrepresentation / Services Not as Described Complaint : I am filing this complaint regarding a charge of {$2200.00} for airline tickets purchased through Booking.com. This dispute arises from materially incorrect information provided by the companys customer service, which I relied upon to make a financial decision that resulted in loss. 

On XX/XX/year>, at XXXX AM, I contacted XXXX regarding tickets purchased on XX/XX/year>. During that call, I asked whether the tickets were refundable. The representative explicitly stated that the tickets were refundable within XXXX hours and that I would receive a refund of the fare, minus only taxes and fees. She confirmed that I could cancel within that timeframe without issue. 

Relying on this information, I rebooked replacement flights for the same passengers and dates at XXXX PM on XX/XX/year>. 

At XXXX PM the same day, I contacted XXXX to cancel the original booking. At that time, I was informed by a different representative that no such XXXX refund policy existed and that canceling would result in a loss of {$890.00}. 

I made multiple attempts to resolve this issue and requested escalation, including a review of the original call recording. Despite repeated assurances of follow-up, I did not receive any meaningful response. 

On XX/XX/year>, I contacted XXXX again and requested a review of internal notes from my XX/XX/XXXX call. A representative confirmed that the notes state : Advised the customer that tickets were refundable Advised of XXXX policy. 

This internal documentation confirms that I was explicitly told there was a XXXX refund window. I relied on that representation when making a second purchase. 

This is not a dispute about policy. It is a case of misrepresentation. I was provided incorrect information by the companys agent and reasonably relied on that information to my financial detriment. 

XXXX has not acknowledged the error or provided a meaningful review despite multiple requests. 

Resolution Requested : * Full refund of the original booking * No penalties or adverse action related to the replacement booking * Review and consideration of call recordings and internal documentation as part of this determination I am currently disputing this charge with Citibank and request that this complaint be forwarded to Booking.com for formal response and resolution. 

I am prepared to provide supporting documentation, including call logs and a detailed timeline, upon request. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
